name: Shell Header
description: Application top bar with brand and optional company picker and avatar

usageGuidance.when: Building application shell; use as top bar with logo, product name, optional company picker, and actions slot
antiPatterns: Don't omit ShellHeader in full shell layouts - it's required for branding
Don't use multiple ShellHeader instances in the same layout

notes.slots: Use the actions slot for header buttons (e.g. user menu, notifications)
notes.themes: Works with all themes (cp, vp, ppm, maconomy)

examples.name: Default header
examples.description: Header with default product name and company picker
